name: cc-mek-scada
description: Configurable ComputerCraft SCADA system for multi-reactor control of Mekanism fission reactors with a GUI, automatic safety features, waste processing control, and more! Please be sure to take a look at the Wiki tab, this project has lots of docs!
description_ja: Mekanism核分裂炉の複数炉制御に対応した設定可能なComputerCraft SCADAシステム。GUI・自動安全機能・廃棄物処理制御などを搭載。Wikiタブもご参照ください
